candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue line; matches Total Revenue exactly in values and is the more direct non-total label.
Also a valid revenue line, but it is a total/subtotal duplicate of Revenues.

variables.notes: Use as priority list for revenue label changes over time; do not sum.

candidates.why: Direct match for COGS and preferred over broader/duplicate cost of revenues rows.
Appears to be a duplicate total of cost of goods sold; less preferred than the direct COGS label.
Related concept but appears to be a different/partial presentation in some years; less preferred than direct COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the direct COGS label rather than duplicate/alternate cost-of-revenues totals.

candidates.why: Core SG&A overhead component above operating profit.
Core SG&A overhead component above operating profit.
Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; included in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it per rule.
Operating overhead bucket above operating profit; not a total/subtotal.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected component overhead rows only. Included R&D because it is separately reported above operating profit and should also be in XSGA so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD excludes it.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; best current label.
Alternate/prior-year R&D label for the same concept.

variables.notes: Priority list for dedicated R&D expense label changes over time; do not sum.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component that should be included with interest expense.
Likely recurring residual finance cost; more granular approach preferred over total financial expenses.
Broader total includes non-interest items such as revaluation losses, so less preferred than granular components.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components and excluded total Financial expenses to avoid including non-recurring valuation/revaluation items and double counting.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which avoids double counting with MIB.
Valid equity line but includes non-controlling interest, so less preferred when parent-only equity exists.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent/owner equity line to exclude non-controlling interests from BE.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
Alternate label for the same concept and useful as fallback across years.

variables.notes: Priority list for NCI/minority-interest label changes over time; do not sum.
